title: AMD XDNA NPU Activation for JEPA Predictor
blocker_message: TWO BLOCKERS resolved, ONE REMAINING: (1) Git symlinks fixed — 24 text stubs converted to real OS symlinks. (2) Correct provider name is VitisAIExecutionProvider (not AMDXDNAExecutionProvider). (3) REMAINING: VitisAI EP in .venv-npu/ built for Python 3.10, but venv uses Python 3.12. EP loads libpython3.10.so.1.0.0 which is not available.
next_step_recommendation: To activate NPU: need VitisAI EP built for Python 3.12. Two options: (A) Create Python 3.10 venv: python3.10 -m venv .venv-npu-py310, then reinstall AMD onnxruntime wheel from ryzenai.docs.amd.com. (B) Get AMD wheel for Python 3.12 from ryzenai.docs.amd.com — AMD distributes custom onnxruntime wheels for Python 3.9-3.12. The .venv-npu/ Python 3.12 environment is otherwise ready (symlinks fixed, onnxruntime 1.24.4, model IR v13 supported, hardware present, vaip config at /home/ianblenke/github.com/amd/RyzenAI-SW/Ryzen-AI-CVML-Library/linux/onnx/ryzen14/vaip_config_npu_2_3.json).

python_compat.error: VitisAI EP requires libpython3.10.so.1.0 but running Python 3.12. Need AMD VitisAI wheel built for Python 3.12.

path_b_prebuilt.error: VitisAI EP Python version mismatch: EP built for Python 3.10, venv uses Python 3.12. Need AMD VitisAI wheel for Python 3.12. Download from ryzenai.docs.amd.com or use Python 3.10 venv.

path_c_source.note: Source build not attempted (20-40 min). Path B symlink fix is sufficient if AMD libs present.

key_findings: FINDING 1: Root cause of Exp 146 symlink blocker: RyzenAI-SW git repo cloned with core.symlinks=false — 0 .so versioning symlinks stored as text files. FIXED by Exp 179.
FINDING 2: Wrong provider name in Exp 146 + npu_backend.py: 'AMDXDNAExecutionProvider' is INCORRECT. AMD examples use 'VitisAIExecutionProvider'. Corrected in Exp 179.
FINDING 3: VitisAI EP Python version mismatch: EP in .venv-npu/ built for Python 3.10, venv uses Python 3.12. Need AMD wheel for Python 3.12.
FINDING 4: onnxruntime 1.20.1 → 1.24.4 upgrade required: ONNX model IR version 13 needs onnxruntime ≥1.22. Upgraded in Exp 179.
FINDING 6: XRT /opt/xilinx/xrt present=True, vaip_config_npu_2_3.json present=True. Hardware + config stack complete; only AMD Python 3.12 wheel missing.
